commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: - [P2] Maintainer/security review should decide whether to accept the beta Kubernetes exec provider after current-head checks finish; I did not find a narrow automated repair to queue.; Cleared: No concrete security or supply-chain defect was found in the current diff; the new Kubernetes exec provider remains security-sensitive and needs maintainer boundary acceptance. (sha=b4a993b35d1c6e5d9162490d3cb1da2c9ce099c1)
commands.review_summary:
Adds a built-in `agent-sandbox` delegated-run provider with config, docs, Kubernetes `kubectl` lifecycle/exec/archive-sync support, local claim ownership, tests, live smoke coverage, and one OpenSandbox race-test synchronization fix.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a new provider PR, not a broken existing behavior report. Validation comes from source review plus the PR body's exact-head live lifecycle proof.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Maintainer/security review should decide whether to accept the beta Kubernetes exec provider after current-head checks finish; I did not find a narrow automated repair to queue.

target.title: feat: add agent-sandbox provider
target.body:
## Summary
- add a Kubernetes Agent Sandbox provider with warmup, run, list, status, stop, cleanup, and doctor support
- target the official Agent Sandbox `v0.5.0rc1` `v1beta1` API through the operator's existing `kubectl`
- archive-sync repositories and stream commands through Kubernetes exec while validating claim ownership, scope, UID, lifecycle, and pinned container identity
- enforce lease TTL through `shutdownTime` with `shutdownPolicy: Retain`, terminal expiry handling, and exact retained-claim cleanup
- add provider docs, metadata, configuration coverage, regression tests, and an opt-in live smoke test with replacement-sync verification

Closes https://github.com/openclaw/crabbox/issues/321

## Dependency cost
- no `go.mod`, `go.sum`, Worker package, or lockfile changes
- no Kubernetes Go SDK dependency; Crabbox invokes the operator's configured `kubectl`
- final Darwin arm64 CLI growth versus `origin/main`: 535,856 bytes (0.410%)

## Security and lifecycle hardening
- reject unsafe kubeconfig paths and option-like Kubernetes identities before constructing kubectl argv
- pin claim UID, provider scope, recovery nonce, local expiry, and selected container before subsequent execution or deletion
- reconcile ambiguous creates only when the exact recovery identity can be proven
- stage archive replacement inside the mounted workdir, preserve rollback data on failure, and avoid requiring a writable parent directory
- fail closed on missing, replaced, expired, or ownership-mismatched claims
- preserve explicit `execTimeoutSecs: 0` as no provider command deadline rather than silently restoring the default

## Verification
Exact reviewed and live-tested head: `b4a993b35d1c6e5d9162490d3cb1da2c9ce099c1`

- `go build -trimpath -o bin/crabbox ./cmd/crabbox`
- `go vet ./...`
- `go test -race ./...`
- `node --test scripts/*.test.js` (235 passed)
- `npm run format:check --prefix worker`
- `npm run lint --prefix worker`
- `npm run check --prefix worker`
- `npm test --prefix worker` (22 files, 604 tests)
- `npm run build --prefix worker`
- `scripts/check-docs.sh` (48 command docs, 56 providers, 179 links)
- `node --test scripts/live-agent-sandbox-smoke.test.js` (6 passed)
- `git diff --check`
- OpenSandbox CI race regression: failing test passed 20 race runs after atomic counter synchronization
- repository autoreview: accepted and fixed zero-timeout semantics finding; rerun clean with no actionable findings

## Live end-to-end proof
Validated on a fresh local kind cluster running the official `registry.k8s.io/agent-sandbox/agent-sandbox-controller:v0.5.0rc1` controller.

- exact-head lifecycle smoke passed on `b4a993b3`: warmup, initial sync/run, retained-lease rerun, replacement sync deleting a stale remote-only file, status, and stop
- adversarial lifecycle passed: implicit container pinning survived a malicious default-container annotation change; claim-scope tampering blocked both run and cleanup; remote exit code 42 was preserved; exact stop removed the claim
- TTL lifecycle passed: `shutdownPolicy: Retain`, controller `ClaimExpired`/`SandboxExpired`, retained root claim with the same UID, deleted sandbox and pod, CLI `state=expired`, then exact stop with zero remaining claims
- post-run cluster state: zero Crabbox Agent Sandbox claims

## Browser verification
Built the docs site and inspected `/providers/agent-sandbox.html` in Chrome. The rendered page documents `v0.5.0rc1`, retained TTL semantics, mounted-workdir staging, terminal expiry handling, replacement-sync live testing, and zero-timeout behavior, with no horizontal overflow at a 1166px viewport.
target.author: coygeek

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
